Description: Weapons of choice for combat
Actual Requirements: Obtain a wood, stone, iron, gold or diamond sword

Description: Shoot something with a bow and arrow
Actual Requirements: Shoot something with an arrow or spectral arrow

Description: Craft a fletching table
Actual Requirements: Obtain a fletching table

Description: Shoot a mob from point-blank range
Actual Requirements: Shoot a mob with an arrow from less than 2 blocks away

Description: Attack a mob by bow-spamming
Actual Requirements: Deal less than 1 damage with an arrow

Description: Kill a skeleton with an arrow from more than 50 meters
Actual Requirements: Kill a Skeleton, Stray, Bogged or Parched with an arrow from at least 50 metres

Description: Hunt all types of land animals with your bow
Actual Requirements: Kill all of the following mobs using any kind of arrows:

Description: Kill a mob at the bottom of the world from the build limit using any kind of projectile
Actual Requirements: Using any projectile, kill a mob at y-level -59.5 or lower while you are at y-level 319 or higher (in the Overworld) or y-level 255 or higher (in the Nether or End)

Description: Craft a crossbow using stick, spider string, iron and a hook
Actual Requirements: Obtain a crossbow

Description: Shoot a crossbow
Give a Pillager a taste of their own medicine
Actual Requirements: Kill a Pillager with a crossbow

Description: Have nine loaded crossbows in your hotbar. All set!
Use gunpowder and paper to craft fireworks
Actual Requirements: Obtain a firework rocket

Description: Craft a firework of every shape and additional effect
Actual Requirements: Obtain firework rockets with the following:These shapes and effects can be on separate rockets

Description: Load your crossbow with a firework
Kill a mob using a firework's explosion
Kill a ghast using a firework's explosion
Hit five mobs in the same Charge attack using a Spear
Use planks and iron to craft a shield
Actual Requirements: Obtain a shield

Description: Protect yourself from an enemy's attack with your shield
Actual Requirements: Block an enemy's attack

Description: Apply a banner to your shield
Actual Requirements: Obtain a shield with any banner

Description: Deflect an attack from every hostile monster
Actual Requirements:
Block an attack from every mob listed next to "Monster Hunter" in the Monsters tab
The following cannot be blocked and are hence not required: Elder Guardian, Guardian, Witch, Evoker, Zombie Horse, Skeleton Horse, Camel Husk

Description: Attack a mob using an axe
Attack mobs using every kind of axe
Hit mobs using every kind of shovel
Kill a mob using a shovel while both of you are standing on a Big Dripleaf
Hit a mob with every type of weapon
Actual Requirements: Hit a mob using the following items:

Description: Throw a trident at something. Note: Throwing away your only weapon is not a good idea
Actual Requirements: Throw a trident such that it hits a mob

Description: Kill a drowned using a trident from at least 30 metres
Hunt all types of aquatic creatures with your trident
Actual Requirements: Kill all of the following mobs using a thrown trident:An Elder Guardian is not required to be killed

Description: Hunt all types of nether creatures with your trident
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Craft a Mace using a Breeze Rod and a Heavy Core, then do a smash attack by hitting a mob after falling
Deal 50 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Mace
Deal 250 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Mace… to one-shot a Warden
Actual Requirements: At least 250 hearts of damage must be dealt to a Warden

Description: Use gunpowder and sand to craft TNT
Actual Requirements: Obtain TNT

Description: Blow up a creeper with TNT
Actual Requirements: Kill a creeper with a TNT's explosion (best to be hand-lit)

Description: Blow up every hostile mob with TNT
Actual Requirements:
Kill all of the mobs listed next to "Monster Hunter" in the Monsters tab using the explosion from TNT lit by either Flint and Steel, a Fire Charge or a Flaming Arrow
Elder Guardian, Wither and Ender Dragon are not required to be killed

Description: Pull a pig using a fishing rod
Actual Requirements: Hook a pig with a fishing rod and reel in with it

Description: Pull a monster using a fishing rod
Actual Requirements: Works with the same mobs as "Monster Hunter"

Description: Pull a pig from 25 blocks below you and watch it go
Actual Requirements: Pull a pig from at least 25 blocks away

Description: The spirit of Christmas... quickly drowned out by a battle
Actual Requirements: Hit a mob with a thrown snowball

Description: Defeat a Blaze using snowballs
Actual Requirements: Kill a blaze with a thrown snowball

Description: Kill a Blaze using a Blaze Rod while both you and it are on fire
Vandalise something with eggs
Actual Requirements: Hit a mob with a thrown egg

Description: Catapult an egg onto a zombie's head
Actual Requirements: Hit a zombie (or any zombie variant) with a thrown egg

Description: Hit a mob with a stick
Slap a mob across the face with a fish
Hit a mob with diamonds
Notes: Was named "Diamonds to you!" until 1.11 Beta Build 1, when it became possible to code the actual achievement this was named after and this one had to be renamed

Description: Kill a zombie while holding a spyglass
Beat a zombie at rock, paper, shears
Actual Requirements:
Kill a zombie that is one of the following:
- Holding cobblestone while you are holding paper 
- Holding shears while you are holding cobblestone 
- Holding paper while you are holding shears

Description: Kill something using a clock
Die twice within ten seconds
Actual Requirements: Die when the last time you died was less than 10 seconds ago

Description: Be on half a heart of health for a minute
